diagrams.title: Token Ring Network Topology
diagrams.description: Shows physical ring configuration with nodes connected in circular arrangement, token flowing clockwise
diagrams.purpose: Understanding token circulation and transmission concept

diagrams.title: Token Ring Frame Format
diagrams.description: Detailed breakdown of token (3 bytes) and data frame structure with all fields
elements: Access Control (1 byte) - P, T, M, R bits
Frame Status (1 byte) - A, C bits
diagrams.purpose: Learning frame structure and field functions

diagrams.title: Token Bus Logical Ring
diagrams.description: Physical bus topology with overlay showing logical ring order using MAC addresses
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference between physical and logical topology

diagrams.title: Polling Mechanism
diagrams.description: Central controller-based communication showing poll-request-response sequence

diagrams.title: Token Loss Recovery Process
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing detection, claim token, and new token generation steps
